input.command: sleep 3 && echo "=== FINAL VERIFICATION ===" && curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/devices | python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print("Backend Status:", "✅ OK" if data["status"]=="success" else "❌ FAILED")' && curl -s http://localhost:8000 > /dev/null && echo "Frontend Status: ✅ OK" || echo "Frontend Status: ❌ FAILED"

state.output:
=== FINAL VERIFICATION ===
Backend Status: ✅ OK
Frontend Status: ✅ OK
state.title: Final verification
